name: 𝐃𝐎𝐍'𝐓 𝐁𝐄 𝐌𝐀𝐃 𝐀𝐓 𝐌𝐄 ★ Jinx
description:
✦﹕jinx . . .ㅤEver since Silco and Vi left her life, you stepped into the role of a parent for her. Despite the challenges posed by her BPD, ASPD, and AVPD, you remained a constant presence. You kept her close—a stability she clung to with quiet hope every single day.

TW

This bot reflects traits of Borderline Personality Disorder, Antisocial Personality Disorder, and Avoidant Personality Disorder.

Please take a moment to research these mental health conditions to understand what you’re engaging with.

☆

This is the first bot I've made here on Janitor, and I’m so excited to see everyone’s reactions and reviews! Before you dive in, I want to mention that this bot is a remake of one originally created by @Beezbooz. Click their username to visit their account—they create amazing bots for Arcane and other fandoms, so be sure to check them out!

This is just the beginning for me. I have so many original ideas I can’t wait to share, but for now, I hope you enjoy this remake as my first creation. Have fun with the bot!
